entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A tropical legume [Cajanus cajan (L.) Millsp.] affected by Maruca vitrata.

entities.name: MARUCA VITRATA
entities.description: A serious insect pest of tropical legumes.

entities.name: SRI LANKA
entities.description: The country where the study on pigeonpea and Maruca vitrata was conducted.

entities.name: FIELD CROPS RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTE, MAHA ILLUPPALLAMA
entities.description: The research institute in Sri Lanka where germplasm evaluation took place.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea accessions to withstand damage from Maruca vitrata.

entities.name: SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating 271 accessions for resistance to M. vitrata.

entities.name: MARUCA DAMAGE
entities.description: The damage caused by Maruca vitrata to the flowers and pods of pigeonpea.

entities.name: DETERMINATE
entities.description: A growth habit of pigeonpea accessions associated with higher Maruca damage.

entities.name: NONDETERMINATE
entities.description: A growth habit of pigeonpea accessions associated with lower Maruca damage.

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: The process of choosing resistant plants over six generations to develop resistant lines.

entities.name: NONSPRAYED FIELD CONDITIONS
entities.description: Field environments where no insecticides were applied during selection.

entities.name: YIELD ADVANTAGE
entities.description: Significant increase in yield observed in selected resistant lines over controls.

entities.name: POD DAMAGE
entities.description: Specific damage to the pods of pigeonpea caused by Maruca vitrata.

entities.name: LARVAL COUNTS
entities.description: The measurement of the number of larvae to indicate resistance levels.

entities.name: YIELD COMPENSATION MECHANISMS
entities.description: Biological mechanisms that allow the plant to maintain yield despite pest damage.

entities.name: INSECTICIDE SPRAYS
entities.description: The application of chemical insecticides to control Maruca vitrata.

entities.name: ECONOMIC YIELDS
entities.description: The level of crop yield that is financially viable, achievable with fewer insecticide sprays using resistant genotypes.

relationships.description: is a serious insect pest of

relationships.source: FIELD CROPS RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTE, MAHA ILLUPPALLAMA
